name: Aldric

1: Don't bother hiding, beast. I'll be done before supper.
They said this dungeon was dangerous. They lied — as they always do.
Watch closely, monster. This is what a real hero looks like.
2: You butchered my classmates. Every one of them had a name. You'll learn mine before the end.
I am not the boy who stumbled out of here. I came back for YOU.
Laugh now. I've spent a year learning exactly how you die.
3: I haven't slept. I've memorized every stone of this pit. There is NOTHING left you can show me.
Do you know how many nights I gave to learning your filth? Tonight it pays.
Last time cost me an eye. I've come to collect the rest of you.
4: The crown has named me its Champion. I am the realm's last hope — and your last sunrise.
I came as a student. I return as a king. Kneel, or fall.
Every soul you slew, I carry into this throne room. They will watch you end.

tauntBoss: Is this truly the best the dark can offer?
Cower in your hole. I'll be at your throne by sundown.
Every step deeper is one step closer to your end, monster.
Send your little pets. I'll send them back in pieces.
banterCompanion: And YOU — consorting with this thing? Have you no shame, creature?
Tell your master to run. Actually — tell her I said she has dreadful taste.
Smile while you can, demon. I've cut down prettier monsters than you.
When I've slain your lord, perhaps I'll let you live to mourn. Perhaps.
companionRetort: Persistent little hero, isn't he? Shall I fetch a broom for the after, my lord?
He talks a big game for someone about to decorate your throne room.
Ooh, I'm trembling. Are we trembling, boss? I don't think we're trembling.
Every single one makes that speech. Every single one ends up a stain.
Let him bark, my lord. We've buried braver — and far prettier.
minionKill: Another of your slaves returned to dust. Send more.
I could do this in my sleep — and some nights, I have.

react._comment: Aldric's living reactions while he scouts the dungeon (Acts I–III), keyed by what he meets. Per act his voice shifts: I the cocky upstart, II the grim avenger who counts the dead, III the sleepless obsessive who has memorized everything. Each source maps to a portrait emotion in NemesisPortrait beats.

1: Cower in your hole. I'll be at your throne by sundown.
Is this truly the best the dark can offer?
Every step deeper is a step closer to your end, monster.
Send your little pets. I'll send them back in pieces.
2: I'm coming for you, monster — one room at a time.
Hide behind your walls. The dead have given me all the time I need.
Closer now. I can almost taste your fear.
Every soul you stole walks beside me tonight.
3: I know exactly where you are. I always know now.
No more games. No more tricks. Just the long walk to your throne.
Stay there. STAY. I want to watch your face when I arrive.
I haven't slept in weeks. I don't need to. I only need YOU.
4: No more dungeon to scout. No more years to wait. Just the throne — and you.
I am the realm's answer to you, monster. I have come to deliver it.
Every soul you took crowned me. They march to your throne with me now.
There is nowhere left to hide. There is only the reckoning.

1: A torture chamber? You decorate like a child playing villain.
Is this meant to frighten me? I've seen grimmer in the royal cellars.
Room after room of cheap little horrors. Adorable, truly.
2: You raised all this on their corpses. I'll raise it to the ground.
I've walked these halls a thousand times in my nightmares. Now I'm awake.
How many did you butcher to learn the shape of this place?
3: I know this room. And the next. And the one after. ALL of them.
You rearranged the stones. Cute. I'd already memorized every one.
Not one shadow in this pit I haven't mapped. Nothing hides from me now.
4: All of this — every horror — ends tonight. I will see it unmade.
I walked out of this pit a boy. I return a king. Look upon me and despair.
Your kingdom of bones. I have come to topple every last stone of it.

1: Ha! A trap? You wound my dignity far more than my flesh.
Sharpened sticks? Truly? THIS is your grand defense?
Cute. Did you honestly think a snare would stop me?
2: A trap. Of course. You never could face me honestly.
Bleed me. Go on. It only hardens what I've become.
Pain and I are old companions now. Are you ready for yours?
3: I KNEW that one was there. I let it bite me. I wanted to feel it.
Your little snares — I've catalogued every one. Old friends, all.
Spring them all! None of it matters! NONE of it stops me!
4: A trap, for a king? You truly have no honor left in you.
Cut me. The realm's hope does not bleed out so easily.
I have bled for every soul you took. One more wound changes nothing.

1: Pathetic. Is that all?
Another slave of yours returned to dust. Send the rest.
I could do this asleep — and some nights, I have.
2: That's one less of yours. I'm counting them. I'm counting ALL of them.
Did it have a name, monster? Mine did. Every last one of mine had a name.
Down it goes. Like the others will. Like YOU will.
3: Dust. Dust. All of it dust before me.
You think your pets can stop what I've made of myself?
I've slain a thousand of these in my sleep. The waking ones fall just as fast.
4: Kneel or fall, like all the rest. The result is the same.
Your servants break against me like waves on stone. I am inevitable.
Another one down. I carry their would-be victims into your throne room.

1: Tch. Barely felt that.
A scratch. You'll have to do better.
...That one I felt. Don't get comfortable.
Grrh — fine. FINE. Now I'm actually trying.
2: A wound for the ledger. I've bled worse for less.
No — not here. Too many of the dead are counting on me to finish this.
Get OFF me! I am their VENGEANCE — you do not get to stop it!
...So much of it is mine, now. But I won't... I will NOT... drop...
3: Pain. Good. Pain means I'm close.
You think a wound turns me back? I gave up SLEEP for you.
Every mark you leave on me, I will return a hundredfold!
I will unmake you if it is the last thing — the ONLY thing — left in me!

1: This isn't over, beast. I'm only getting warmed up.
Enjoy tonight. I'll be back — and far better.
2: Remember my face, monster. You'll see it again.
I retreat. I do NOT surrender. There is a difference you'll come to dread.
3: Next time I walk out of here, it will be over your corpse.
Bind your wounds. Mine are already healing into something worse for you.

1: Aldric escaped your dungeon, vowing to return stronger.
The young swordsman fled — but he was smiling.
2: Aldric withdrew again, his eyes colder than before.
He left no boast this time. Only a promise.
3: Aldric vanished into the dark, muttering of a crown.
Word spreads: the kingdom means to name its Champion.

opener: No more games, monster. No more dungeon to hide behind. Just you, me, and the end of all evil.
This is the moment I was forged for. Try to make it worthy.
mid: You're stronger than the rumors. Good. A true hero needs a true monster.
Is that fear I see? In a thing like you? Delicious.
low: No — NO. I am the HERO. The hero does not LOSE!
I did not come this far to KNEEL!
victory: Evil ends here. As I always promised it would.
Rest now, monster. The realm is free of you.
defeat: ...How. I did everything right. I was supposed to be...
Tell them... tell them I tried to be great...

desperate.opener: You made the realm BLEED — so they crowned its rage, and I am all of it. Every throat you slit, I answer for tonight.
desperate.low: I am their VENGEANCE — I cannot fall, I will not, there are too many DEAD behind me!

radiant.opener: Even from a thing like you — a flicker of mercy. The realm saw it, and chose hope over fear. I am that hope, monster, and hope does not break.
radiant.low: The realm believes in me. I will NOT betray that light — not to you, not to anything!
